config.welcome_msg: System Booted: Success. Type 'help' to see all commands.

commands.help: Available commands: about, experience, skills, contact, clear

about.text: Dedicated and results-oriented full-stack developer with 4+ years of experience. Expert in transforming ideas into tangible solutions with strong DevOps and Azure capabilities.

experience.details: Key developer and Module Lead for a high-security digital platform, focusing on scalable system architecture and complex third-party integrations (DHL, World Courier). Delivered a robust Document Management System and an Authenticator Application, showcasing expertise in building enterprise-grade, secure foundations necessary for future AI-driven services.
Developing industry-standard CAD parts version control software using Blazor and .NET Core API.
Pioneered AI-driven coding tool utilizing OpenAI API. Managed AWS deployments via Jenkins.

Contributed to the success of IVY Retailer as a key member of the interface team, specializing in developing Restful services using DotNet Core and Angular (13) for the front end. Executed responsibilities included writing unit test cases, managing complex stored procedures, and optimizing both procedures and code for defined user stories, ensuring a seamless product experience
